title: Solid state forms of cediranib maleate
abstract: The present disclosure relates to solid state forms of Cediranib maleate, processes for preparation thereof and pharmaceutical compositions thereof.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS: 1. A crystalline form of Cediranib maleate, wherein the crystalline form is: a crystalline form of Cediranib maleate designated as form D, characterized by data selected from one or more of the following: an XRPD pattern having peaks at 7.8, 8.1, 9.9, 20.3 and 26.2 degrees 2-theta Â± 0.2 degrees 2-theta; an XRPD pattern as depicted in Figure 1; and combinations of these data; or a crystalline form of Cediranib maleate designated as form F, characterized by data selected from one or more of the following: an XRPD pattern having peaks at 9.6, 14.1, 14.7, 18.3 and 23.4 degrees 2-theta Â± 0.2 degrees 2-theta; an XRPD pattern as depicted in Figure 4; and combinations of these data. 2. The crystalline Form D of Cediranib maleate according to claim 1, characterized by data selected from one or more of the following: an XRPD pattern having peaks at 7.8, 8.1, 9.9, 20.3 and 26.2 degrees 2-theta Â± 0.2 degrees 2-theta; an XRPD pattern as depicted in Figure 1; and combinations of these data. 3. The crystalline Form D of Cediranib maleate according to claim 1 or claim 2, further characterized by data selected from one or more of the following: the XRPD pattern having peaks at 7.8, 8.1, 9.9, 20.3 and 26.2 degrees 2-theta Â± 0.2 degrees 2-theta, and also having one, two, three, four or five additional peaks selected from 9.2, 14.7, 15.3, 16.2 and 20.7 degrees two theta Â± 0.2 degrees two theta; Raman spectrum having peaks at 3048, 2939, 1706, 1393, 1243 and 969 cm "1 Â± 4 cm "1 ' Raman spectrum as depicted in figure 7; and combinations of these data. 4. The crystalline Form F of Cediranib maleate according to claim 1, characterized by data selected from one or more of the following: an XRPD pattern having peaks at 9.6, 14.1, 14.7, 18.3 and 23.4 degrees 2-theta Â± 0.2 degrees 2-theta; an XRPD pattern as depicted in Figure 4; and combinations of these data. 5. The crystalline Form F of Cediranib maleate according to claim 1 or claim 4, further characterized by data selected from one or more of the following: the XRPD pattern having peaks at 9.6, 14.1, 14.7, 18.3 and 23.4 degrees 2-theta Â± 0.2 degrees 2-theta, and also having one, two, three, four or five additional peaks selected from 5.6, 13.4, 14.0, 19.3 and 20.8 degrees two theta Â± 0.2 degrees 2-theta; Raman spectrum having peaks at 2947, 

 1421, 1382, 1316 and 941 cm "1 Â± 4 cm "1 ; Raman spectrum as depicted in figure 8; and combinations of these data. 6. The crystalline Form F of Cediranib maleate according to any one of claims 1, 4 or 5, wherein the crystalline form is a hydrate 7. A pharmaceutical composition comprising a crystalline form according to any one of claims 1 to 7. 8. Use of the crystalline form according to any one of claims 1 to 6 in the manufacture of pharmaceutical compositions and/or formulations. 9. A pharmaceutical formulation comprising a crystalline form according to any one of claims 1 to 6 or the pharmaceutical composition of claim 7, and at least one pharmaceutically acceptable excipient. 10. A process for preparing the pharmaceutical formulation according to claim 9, comprising combining a crystalline form according to any one of claims 1 to 6 or the pharmaceutical composition of claim 7, with at least one pharmaceutically acceptable excipient. 11. The crystalline form, according to any one of claims 1 to 6, the pharmaceutical composition according to claim 7, or the pharmaceutical formulation according to claim 9, for use as a medicament. 12. The crystalline form, according to any one of claims 1 to 6, the pharmaceutical composition according to claim 7, or the pharmaceutical formulation according to claim 9, for use in the treatment of Cancer. 13. A method of treating cancer, comprising administering a therapeutically effective amount of a crystalline form according to any one of claims 1 to 6, the pharmaceutical composition according to claim 7, or the pharmaceutical formulation according to claim 9, to a subject suffering from cancer, or otherwise in need of the treatment. 14. The crystalline form, according to any one of claims 1 to 6, the pharmaceutical composition according to claim 7, or the pharmaceutical formulation according to claim 9, for the manufacture of a medicament for treating cancer. 15. Use of the crystalline Form according to any one of claims 1 to 6 in the preparation of another solid state form of Cediranib maleate, Cediranib base, or other Cediranib salt or solid state form thereof. 16. A process for preparing Cediranib base or a solid state form thereof comprising preparing crystalline form of Cediranib maleate according to any one of claims 1 to 6, and converting it to Cediranib base. 17. The process according to claim 16, wherein the conversion is accomplished by a process comprising preparing a solution using crystalline form of Cediranib maleate according to any one of claims 1 to 6, and basifying the solution to produce the Cediranib base. 18. A process for preparing a Cediranib salt or a solid state form thereof comprising preparing crystalline form of Cediranib maleate according to any one of claims 1 to 6, and converting it to the Cediranib salt. 19. The process according to claim 18, wherein the conversion is accomplished by a process comprising preparing a solution using the crystalline form of Cediranib maleate according to any one of claims 1 to 6, basifying the solution to produce Cediranib base, and reacting the Cediranib base with an appropriate acid to obtain the Cediranib salt.
